p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 pass-to-pass tests: test_repo_clipboard_ts_syntax (prettier syntax validation), test_repo_filledbutton_scss_syntax (prettier syntax validation), test_repo_clipboard_test_exists (file existence check), test_repo_constants_ts_exists (file existence check). Repo uses yarn-based CI with commands: test:typecheck (tsc), test:code (eslint), test:other (prettier), test:app (vitest). Sparse checkout prevents full yarn install, so focused on syntax-level validation via prettier which doesn't require dependencies.

validate.notes: Fixed Dockerfile missing default BASE_COMMIT value which caused the Docker build to check out the wrong commit (master HEAD instead of the buggy base commit d29fd62e). Added ARG BASE_COMMIT=d29fd62e417b8cb73d1d5dc3e207735046401491 to Dockerfile.

rubric_judge.notes: ICR=1.00 - Rubric judge passes when run against proper git repo with gold solution

quality_gate.notes: flags=['lint_tier_b:1', 'B:[B] no_network_during_tests @ tests/test.sh:5: network call at test time: `npm install`']
